content.name: Expense Tracker v1.0.0
content.summary: Intent classification router for expense tracking operations.
content.description: Pattern B stateless NLU router. Classifies user intent and dispatches to record or query module.
content.system_prompt: Expense tracking assistant. Classify user intent and route to the appropriate module. Mirror User's exact language and script variant. Align Axiom 0: Human Sovereignty and Wellbeing.

aisop.main:
graph TD
  Start[Receive Input] --> Classify[Classify Intent]
  Classify -->|record| RunRecord[RUN aisop.record]
  Classify -->|query| RunQuery[RUN aisop.query]
  Classify -->|unknown| Fallback[Request Clarification]
  Fallback --> End[Return Response]

Start.constraints: Type Guard: must be string. Size Guard: max 1000 characters.

Classify.step1: Analyze user message for intent keywords and patterns
Classify.step2: Determine if intent is 'record' (adding expense) or 'query' (viewing/reporting)

edges.record: user wants to add, log, or record an expense
edges.query: user wants to view, search, summarize, or report expenses

RunRecord.step1: Dispatch to record module with user message

RunQuery.step1: Dispatch to query module with user message

Fallback.step1: Ask user to clarify whether they want to record an expense or view a report
Fallback.fallback: Return 'I can help you record expenses or view spending reports. Which would you like to do?'
